name: ECOSPRIN AV 75 1*15CAP
description: Combination medication that helps prevent heart attacks and strokes and treats high cholesterol.
uses: Prevention of heart attacks and strokes
dosage: One capsule daily at a fixed time; swallow whole without crushing or chewing.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place and away from light.

name: ELECTRAL MD ORAnge 30 ML
description: Oral rehydration therapy of electrolytes and fluid used to prevent dehydration from diarrhea, vomiting, or gastroenteritis.
dosage: Mix sachet contents in fresh drinking water and consume within one hour of preparation.
storageInstructions: Store at room temperature below 30°C. Keep away from moisture and heat.

name: ELECTRAL 21.80GM
description: Oral rehydration therapy of electrolytes and fluid used to prevent dehydration from diarrhea, vomiting, or gastroenteritis.
dosage: Mix sachet contents in fresh drinking water and consume within one hour of preparation.
storageInstructions: Store at room temperature below 30°C. Keep away from moisture and heat.

name: EMBETA 25
description: Used to treat high blood pressure and heart-related conditions such as angina and heart failure.
dosage: Take as directed by your doctor; swallow whole with water at a fixed time daily.
storageInstructions: Store below 25°C. Protect from light and moisture.

name: EMBETA XR 25
description: Used to treat high blood pressure and heart-related conditions such as angina, heart failure.
dosage: Take as instructed by doctor; swallow whole with water at a fixed time daily.
storageInstructions: Store at room temperature and away from direct heat and moisture.

name: EMPASOV SM 10/100/1000 1*10
description: A combination medication used to control high blood sugar in patients with type 2 diabetes mellitus.
uses: Blood sugar control when diet and exercise alone are insufficient
dosage: Take as prescribed by your doctor, preferably after meals.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.

name: ENLIVA 1*10
description: A combination of Rabeprazole and Levosulpiride for treating gastrointestinal reflux disease.
dosage: Take as directed by physician before food.
sideEffects: Diarrhea, abdominal pain, bloating, constipation, nausea
storageInstructions: Store below 30°C in a cool, dry place, away from children.
